name: Crockpot Chili
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the hamburger and drain off excess fat.
2. Chop onion finely.
3. Mince garlic cloves.
4. In a large bowl or crockpot, combine browned hamburger, chopped onions, minced garlic, chili powder, salt, paprika, oregano, cumin, beef broth, chopped tomatoes, kidney beans, cayenne, and tabasco sauce.
5. Stir to ensure all ingredients are well mixed.
6. Transfer the mixture to a crockpot.
7. Cook on low for 8-10 hours or until the flavors have melded together.
